story.title: Run the complete regression suite
story.description: Verify the renderer, structured metadata, widget state, static assertions, and documentation changes together using the repository’s documented validation commands.

project_file_index.role: Extension entry point containing registered slash commands, tools, and their respective help texts.
User-facing usage and command/tool parameter documentation.
UI widget and message renderer test suite.
Structured report processing and parsing test suite.

definition_of_done.description: Verify that static test assertions pass successfully.
edge_cases: Docs and command help strings match requirements
Command arguments are parsed and typed correctly

definition_of_done.description: Verify that behavioral integration tests pass successfully.
edge_cases: Claude and Codex review providers behave as expected
Workflow orchestration handles timeout and cancellation

definition_of_done.description: Verify that UI and rendering tests pass successfully.
edge_cases: TUI widget lines are formatted and truncated safely under narrow widths
Custom message summaries handle structured metadata details correctly

definition_of_done.description: Verify that structured report parsing tests pass successfully.
edge_cases: Balanced JSON extraction is robust against leading/trailing noise
Effective verdict blocks on P1 failures correctly

definition_of_done.description: Verify strict type-checking compiles with zero diagnostics.
edge_cases: TS files conform strictly to target ES2022 and bundler module resolution with noEmit
